verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh cleanser of the mess I've made Upon the hill our places trade Stretched on a cross Your body crushed By human hands You formed from dust

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How wonderful Your mercy is How awesome are Your ways I come, I come To worship You For all You've done

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh cleanser of the mess I've made Your boundless love for me portrayed With patience for my learning curve By holding back what I deserve

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh cleanser of the mess I've made With everything at Your feet laid I watch as all my cares erode And from my soul these words explode
